note: Maps each newly-introduced i18n key to the source-code locations whose hardcoded literal should be replaced with `t("<key>")`. Generated by 4 parallel agents from the check-i18n-hardcoded baseline; keys are exempted from i18n-orphans until the sweep replaces the literals. Refresh by re-running the 4-agent flow + bun scripts/_merge-i18n-proposals.ts.
